-C.hint: comment or email — NOT a filename

nohup.note: nohup accepts NO flags before the command. Correct: nohup cmd &

useradd.summary: -m (create home)  -s shell  -d homedir  -g group  -G groups  -u uid  -c comment

chage.summary: -M max_days  -m min_days  -W warn_days  -I inactive_days  -E expire_date  -d last_change  -l (list)

-d.hint: last password change date (0 = force change now)

gdb.note: To open a core dump: gdb /path/to/binary /path/to/corefile

-F.hint: sampling frequency in Hz — use 99 or 999, NOT 999999
